case_title: SANCHEZ, JAIME VS LUXOR CAB COMPANY et al

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SANCHEZ, JAIME RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUXOR CAB COMPANY LAZAR, PAM LAZAR, BILL GATES, PAUL $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,020.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
